summary: First full test run of PARA Log app (cinematic naval home + IDE digital garden). All 9 backend API tests pass (100%). All critical frontend flows verified end-to-end: home hero, scroll-reveal beats, CTA navigation, /log sidebar with 4 PARA folders, seed banner, real-time search filter, tag chip filter + reset, post card → detail view (markdown rendered), back button, deep-link support, and sync/refresh triggering POST /api/log/refresh.

minor.issue: Review request references a legacy /api/status endpoint but server.py defines no such route (returns 404). No functional impact for this app; flag only if parity with scaffold is required.

action_items: Optional: if /api/status legacy parity is required, add a simple status/health route in server.py (currently 404).
Review-request text mentions the post slug 'para-log-system' but actual seed slug is 'para-log' (URL used: /log/Projects/para-log). No code change needed — just noting for docs/request wording.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py line 18: mongo_url = os.environ['MONGO_URL'] raises KeyError at import time if unset — acceptable in this environment (supervisor provides it) but consider guarding for local dev.

server.py: GitHub calls are unauthenticated when GITHUB_TOKEN is not set — 60 req/hr shared IP limit. _build_tree makes 1 + N(folders) + M(files) calls; cache TTL=300s mitigates, but consider exponential backoff on 403/429.
server.py: case-insensitive path match in /log/post is good; consider also normalizing slashes / leading './' for robustness.
Log.jsx: tag-chip-${tag} data-testid keeps colons (e.g. 'tag-chip-cadence:-weekly'); works with CSS attribute selectors but CSS id/class selectors would break — safe since only data-testid is used.
PostCard/PostView: LucideByName dynamically indexes Icons[name]; invalid icon names silently render nothing — acceptable fallback, already handled.
seed_data_creation: None. Backend returns 7 embedded seed posts (Projects x2, Areas x2, Resources x2, Archives x1) because target GitHub repo elmalika2001/port is empty — as expected.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend has 3 log endpoints under /api/log/* + root /api/. MongoDB is scaffold-only (no persistence code). Frontend uses REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL and data-testid throughout. Seed mode is expected until markdown files are committed to the repo. Verified data-testids: hero-title, hero-cta-log, beat-manifesto/compass/quote/cta, beat-cta-log-button, home-footer, log-root, log-sidebar, para-folder-{projects|areas|resources|archives}, para-folder-toggle-*, sidebar-post-{slug}, sidebar-refresh-button, ide-search-input, tag-filter-row, tag-chip-all, tag-chip-{tag}, seed-banner, post-card-{slug}, markdown-post-view, post-back-button, post-markdown-body, post-tag-{tag}, section-{folder}, log-loading, log-error, log-empty. Backend pytest file lives at /app/backend/tests/test_log_api.py — reuse for regression.
